title: cerastium fontanum var. glandulosum
intro: Cerastium fontanum var. glandulosum, also known as sticky mouse-ear or glandular mouse-ear, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cerastium fontanum var. glandulosum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
